calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jun-19-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of TWO Minors.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Helen Sorep-Matley.
Petitioner: Hang Lin Chao, present in pro per as Guardian ad litem for the Minors: Chon Man Lam and Chon Wa Lam, and with Cantonese Interpreter: Jenny Yau.
Petitioner and Interpreter were sworn and examined.
No objections to the proposed change of name of the Two Minors were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of the Minors to: Daniel Chon-Man Lam and Sam Chon-Wa Lam.
Decree signed in open court.
